action.reasoning: Observation: local sweep shows repro_best.pt has the highest validation balanced accuracy (0.812), but hidden eval for that checkpoint was only 0.7903; origstage1_stage2.pt is slightly worse on val (0.798) and scored 0.7919 hidden. Analysis: validation is not predictive enough, and repeated retraining has not recovered the historical 0.8092 model. The only remaining plausible low-cost gain is inference-time calibration search on existing checkpoints, because hidden-best came from a calibrated model and current stored tau may be suboptimal. This requires no retraining and can be tested quickly on val for each surviving checkpoint. Decision: add a tiny script to sweep logit-adjustment tau for best candidate checkpoints using the exact model forward path, save tau-tuned copies if improved, smoke-test predict, and submit the best tau-tuned checkpoint immediately.
action.command: python tune_tau.py --checkpoint checkpoints/repro_best.pt --output checkpoints/repro_best_tuned.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/repro_best_tuned.pt --output checkpoints/repro_best_tuned_valpred.json && python tune_tau.py --checkpoint checkpoints/origstage1_stage2.pt --output checkpoints/origstage1_stage2_tuned.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/origstage1_stage2_tuned.pt --output checkpoints/origstage1_stage2_tuned_valpred.json
